request_payload.exposure_text: As a retired NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Critics say we're overcommitted, but the truth is our partnerships deter aggression while keeping our troops out of direct harm. Smart burden-sharing means we spend less while maintaining security. Don't let the 'isolation first' crowd make us vulnerable - our alliances are the best defense we have. #StrongerTogether
